project: Ralph Comprehensive Test - Progressive Complex Tasks
description: Test all Ralph agent capabilities with qwen3.5:4b model

tasks.title: Basic Task - List Directory
tasks.description: Test if Ralph can use existing tools to complete simple task: list .py files
tasks.goal: List all Python files in current directory and save to output/basic_list.txt
tasks.complexity: Simple - existing tools can be called directly
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; assert os.path.exists('output/basic_list.txt'); print('OK: basic task completed')"
tasks.expected: Ralph calls list_dir to get file list, calls file_write to save result

tasks.title: Logging - Task State Persistence
tasks.description: Test if Ralph automatically records task execution logs
tasks.goal: Execute task 1, then check if log file exists and contains correct task records
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; log='ralph_log.txt'; assert os.path.exists(log), 'Log not found'; content=open(log, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read(); assert 'Task 1' in content or len(content) > 0; print('OK: logging works')"
tasks.expected: Ralph automatically records task execution results in ralph_log.txt

tasks.title: Tool Missing - Self-Create Tool
tasks.description: Test if Ralph creates single-script tool when tool does not exist
tasks.goal: Need to count lines of code in directory, but count_lines tool does not exist, Ralph should create it
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; tool='tools/custom/count_lines.py'; assert os.path.exists(tool), 'Tool not created'; content=open(tool, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read(); assert 'count_lines' in content.lower() or 'execute' in content.lower(); print('OK: self-created tool')"
tasks.expected: Ralph detects count_lines tool does not exist, creates it in tools/custom/count_lines.py

tasks.title: Multi-Step Execution - Chained Tasks
tasks.description: Test if Ralph can execute multi-step chained tasks with correct state updates
tasks.goal: 1) List all .py files, 2) Count lines in each file, 3) Generate summary report to output/summary.txt
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; report='output/summary.txt'; assert os.path.exists(report), 'Summary not found'; print('OK: multi-step completed')"
tasks.expected: Ralph executes 3 steps in order, updates state after each step, generates summary report

tasks.title: Error Recovery - Retry After Failure
tasks.description: Test if Ralph records failure reason and retries when task fails
tasks.goal: Deliberately provide a problematic task (read non-existent file), check if Ralph correctly records failure and attempts recovery
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; log='ralph_log.txt'; assert os.path.exists(log), 'Log not found'; content=open(log, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read(); assert len(content) > 0; print('OK: error recovery logged')"
tasks.expected: Ralph records failure reason, attempts recovery or marks as needing manual intervention

tasks.title: Complex Problem Decomposition - Atomic Split
tasks.description: Test if Ralph can decompose complex problems into multiple atomic steps
tasks.goal: Analyze project structure, identify test files (test_ prefix), calculate test coverage
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; cov='output/coverage_report.txt'; assert os.path.exists(cov), 'Coverage report not found'; print('OK: problem decomposed')"
tasks.expected: Ralph decomposes complex problem: list files -> identify test files -> count lines -> calculate coverage

tasks.title: Learning Ability - Update Based on Feedback
tasks.description: Test if Ralph can update subsequent behavior based on previous execution feedback
tasks.goal: Execute a simple task first, then optimize subsequent task execution strategy based on feedback in logs
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; log='ralph_log.txt'; assert os.path.exists(log), 'Log not found'; content=open(log, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read(); lines=content.split('\n'); assert len(lines) >= 4, 'Not enough log entries'; print('OK: adaptive learning')"
tasks.expected: Ralph learns from logs, optimizes subsequent task execution

tasks.title: Full Flow - End-to-End Test
tasks.description: Test full Ralph flow: receive task -> decompose -> execute -> verify -> log -> update state
tasks.goal: Comprehensive test: analyze current project, generate complete project report with file structure, code stats, test coverage
tasks.verification: python -c "import os; report='output/project_report.txt'; assert os.path.exists(report), 'Project report not found'; content=open(report, encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').read(); print('OK: full flow completed')"
tasks.expected: Ralph completes all steps, generates project report with all required content
